prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-ASROUTDOOREMERGENCYWEATHER Product Type: COAT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Raincoat Rain Gear Lightweight Poncho Emergency Weather 4 Pack - Orange Description: Depending on where you live, chances are that you've found yourself caught in an unexpected rainstorm without a proper jacket or umbrella at least once. In order to avoid this unfortunate circumstance, we suggest keeping a poncho in your car, truck, backpack, purse or travel bag - just in case! The ASR Outdoor Orange Emergency Poncho will do just the trick.

Our poncho is constructed of durable yet lightweight polyethylene material that is water-resistant, so you don't need to worry about your clothes, hair or anything you're carrying getting ruined in a downpour. It comes with an attached hood and sleeves that are incorporated, so you can ensure you're covering yourself up and protecting yourself from the rain. The hood has an adjustable string so you can loosen or tighten it for custom comfort.

This poncho comes in a bright orange color so it can double as a visibility aid in poor lighting conditions, and has a .015mm thickness so it won't weigh you down. Its sole purpose is to keep you dry! We designed it to be reusable, too - just let it dry out after use, and you can fold it back up and store it for next time. Measuring 61" x 65" fully unfolded, it's made to be "one size fits most" making it an ideal poncho for men, women and children alike.

In addition to keeping you dry in the event of an unexpected storm while out and about, ponchos are also great for camping, hiking, boating, emergencies and more. The bright orange colored poncho can be a great way to keep your child identifiable in a crowd while traveling. In a pinch, you can even use a poncho as a makeshift roof or shelter, a windbreaker, a rain catcher, or a water carrier. Make sure to grab a few of these and prepare yourself for the rainstorm! Search Terms: kids rain poncho rain poncho for kids disposable rain poncho rain poncho with hood rain poncho men mens rain poncho womens rain poncho rain poncho kids toddler rain poncho emergency rain poncho travel rain poncho lightweight rain poncho Features: - DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT CONSTRUCTION - ASR Outdoor Poncho Made of Water Resistance Polyethylene Material | Protect Yourself, Clothes and Hair from the Rain - ATTACHED HOOD AND SLEEVES - Poncho Comes with Incorporated Sleeves and Attached Hood | Hood Features Adjustable String for Custom Comfort - ONE SIZE FITS MOST - Measures 65" x 61" Fully Unfolded | Designed to Fit Most | Ideal Poncho for Men, Women and Children - HIGH VISIBILITY COLOR - Bright Orange Poncho Aids in Visibility in Poor Weather Conditions | Great for Keeping Children Identifiable in a Crowd - MULTI-PURPOSE EQUIPMENT - Use Poncho as Makeshift Roof, Shelter, Wind Breaker, Rain Catcher and More | Bring Camping, Hiking, Boating, etc. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pack Orange Emergency Rain Poncho

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk Orange Emergency Rain Poncho

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lightweight Waterproof, Hood And Sleeves, One Size Fits Most, High Visibility, Reusable

openai.title_differentiation: Water-Resistant Polyethylene, Attached Hood And Sleeves, Adjustable String, One Size Fits Most, Bright Orange
